Order - Sheriff's Affidavit Warrant Recalled ON 04/21/20

/TWS/CH2:CJ 44D /CTS:44 /CCC1:19016455,20004594/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/CTORD:FINES AND FEES ON THIS MATTER ARE STAYEDPURSUANT TO PEOPLE V, DUENAS/4019HALF/SA1:KATHLEEN ANNE CARIFFEE;SARA LILA TRAVIS;LUTFUS SAYEED/SAORD3/SAORD/DISM3/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 2,PC 602,5(A)A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVID WARRANT & VIOLATION OF STAY AWAY ORDER/ /INTC/VD:04-29-20/TBH:19018000 & 19016455/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & DISPOSITION/DOP/

/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT NON-COMP & VIOLATION OF STAY AWAY ORDER/DAWT/X:DOCTOR CLEMENCIA-ALLEN FOUND DEFENDANT NOT FIT TO ATTEND COURT/BAIL:5000/X:NO CITE/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CAUSE1/CONT/DOPC/
/CAL: STATUS OF COORDINATESD RELEASE FOR GPS/X: DEFENDANT HAS BEEN RELEASED AND PLACED GPS MONITORING/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & PROGRESS REPORT ON 04-29-20/ /CONTD: JURY TRIAL ON 06-03-20/SB:2HRS/
/CAL:STATUS OF GPS/DAWT/X:M99 HOLD IN CASE 20004709 DISCHARGED/NTW/LDTR:07-16-20 (COVID19:04-01-20)/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND STATUS OF GPS ON 04-20-20 AND JURY TRIAL ON 06-03-20/DOPC/

/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/INTC/CTORD:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANTDISCHARGED/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACEDON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SETFORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITHCOORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: STATUS OF GPS/DOP

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/987,2/ACM/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ONTHE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PROOF OF GPS/DOP/
/CAL: STATUS OF COORDINATED RELEASE/X: THE DEFENDANT REMAINS IN CUSTODY INMEDICAL ISOLATION,/CONTD: STATUS OF COORDINATED RELEASE AND GPS/DOP/
